title: mstack project config
description: Per-repo overrides read by mstack skills via resolve-config.sh. Every field is optional; omitted fields are auto-detected (package manager from lockfile, layout from directory structure, mobile target presence). Place at <repo-root>/.mstack/config.json.

packageScope.description: Workspace package scope, e.g. "@acme". Used when reasoning about internal imports.

paths.description: Project-relative file/dir locations. Defaults follow the detected layout (monorepo: packages/config + apps/web; flat: src/config + repo root).

globalsCss.description: Global CSS file that mirrors the tokens.

brandSource.description: Single source for brand strings (name, tagline).

webApp.description: Web app root. "." for a flat single-app repo.

mobileApp.description: Mobile (Expo) app root, or null if the project has no mobile target.

commands.description: Package scripts. Defaults derive from the detected package manager (pnpm: "pnpm <script>"; npm/bun: "<pm> run <script>").

genMobileTw.description: Regenerates the mobile Tailwind config from tokens. Only meaningful when a mobile app is present.

brandStringLiteralRule.description: If true, skills enforce that brand strings appear only in brandSource.

serviceLayer.description: Where business logic / pure functions live.

apiPrefix.description: HTTP route prefix for the app's API.
